PowerShell($files = @\("assets/writing/lexicon/adjectives.json","assets/writing/lexicon/nouns.json","assets/writing/units/l1_be_am_is_are.json"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { try { Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Write-Output "OK  $f" } catch { Write-Output "BAD $f : $_" } })

PowerShell($files = @\("assets/writing/units/l1_present_simple.json","assets/writing/units/l1_be_am_is_are.json"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { try { Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Write-Output "OK  $f" } catch { Write-Output "BAD $f : $_" } })

PowerShell($files = @\("l1_present_simple_iywt","l1_past_was_were","l1_present_continuous","l1_have_got","l1_there_is_are","l1_present_simple_negatives","l1_present_simple_questions","l1_be_neg_questions","l1_present_simple","l1_be_am_is_are"\); foreach \($n in $files\) { $f = "assets/writing/units/$n.json"; try { $j = Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $b = \($j.teach.blocks | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'agreement' }\); $cnt = if \($b\) { $b.buckets.Count } else { 0 }; Write-Output "OK  $n  \(agreement buckets: $cnt\)" } catch { Write-Output "BAD $n : $_" } })

PowerShell($files = @\("l1_present_simple","l1_be_am_is_are","l1_present_simple_iywt","l1_past_was_were","l1_present_continuous","l1_have_got","l1_there_is_are","l1_present_simple_negatives","l1_present_simple_questions","l1_be_neg_questions"\); foreach \($n in $files\) { $f = "assets/writing/units/$n.json"; try { $j = Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $lc = \($j.teach.form_note_mm -split "`n"\).Count; Write-Output "OK  $n  \(note lines: $lc\)" } catch { Write-Output "BAD $n : $_" } })

PowerShell($dir = "assets/writing/units"; $terms = @\('ကြိယာ','နာမ်','ဝါကျ','ကတ္တား','နာမ်စား','အနည်းကိန်း','အများကိန်း'\); $names = @\('l1_articles_contrast','l1_a_an','l1_be_neg_questions','l1_countable_uncountable','l1_have_got','l1_past_irregular','l1_past_neg_questions','l1_past_regular','l1_past_was_were','l1_plural_nouns','l1_some_any','l1_the','l1_there_is_are','l1_this_that'\); foreach \($n in $names\) { $j = Get-Content "$dir/$n.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; for \($i=0; $i -lt $j.exercises.Count; $i++\) { $ex = $j.exercises[$i]; foreach \($fld in @\('prompt_mm','explain_mm'\)\) { $v = $ex.$fld; if \($v\) { foreach \($t in $terms\) { if \($v -match $t\) { Write-Output "=== $n  [ex$i.$fld]"; Write-Output $v; break } } } } } })

PowerShell($ok=$true; foreach \($f in @\("assets/writing/units/l2_present_perfect.json","assets/writing/units/index.json"\)\) { try { $j = Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "OK  $f" } catch { Write-Output "BAD $f : $_"; $ok=$false } }; $idx = Get-Content "assets/writing/units/index.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $l2 = $idx | Where-Object { $_.level -eq 2 }; $open = \($l2 | Where-Object { $_.published -eq $true }\).Count; Write-Output "L2 units: $\($l2.Count\)  published: $open"; $pp = Get-Content "assets/writing/units/l2_present_perfect.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "pilot form_note lines: $\($pp.teach.form_note_mm.Count\)  exercises: $\($pp.exercises.Count\)  agreement buckets: $\(\($pp.teach.blocks | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'agreement' }\).buckets.Count\)")

PowerShell(foreach \($f in @\("assets/writing/units/l2_past_continuous.json","assets/writing/units/l2_present_perfect_vs_past.json","assets/writing/units/index.json"\)\) { try { Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Write-Output "OK  $f" } catch { Write-Output "BAD $f : $_" } }; $idx = Get-Content "assets/writing/units/index.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $s21 = $idx | Where-Object { $_.section_id -eq '2.1' }; foreach \($u in $s21\) { $open = if \($u.published -and $u.asset\) {'OPEN'} else {'locked'}; Write-Output \("  2.1  {0,-40} {1}" -f $u.title, $open\) }; $l2 = $idx | Where-Object { $_.level -eq 2 }; $opened = @\($l2 | Where-Object { $_.published -eq $true }\).Count; Write-Output "L2 total=$\($l2.Count\) open=$opened")

PowerShell(foreach \($n in @\("l2_comparatives","l2_superlatives"\)\) { try { Get-Content "assets/writing/units/$n.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Write-Output "OK  $n" } catch { Write-Output "BAD $n : $_" } }; $idx = Get-Content "assets/writing/units/index.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "--- index OK ---"; $s = $idx | Where-Object { $_.section_id -eq '2.3' }; foreach \($u in $s\) { $open = if \($u.published -and $u.asset\) {'OPEN'} else {'locked'}; Write-Output \("  2.3  {0,-32} {1}" -f $u.title, $open\) }; $l2 = $idx | Where-Object { $_.level -eq 2 }; Write-Output "L2 total=$\($l2.Count\) open=$\(@\($l2 | Where-Object {$_.published -eq $true}\).Count\)")

PowerShell(try { Get-Content "assets/writing/units/l2_gerund_infinitive.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Write-Output "OK  l2_gerund_infinitive" } catch { Write-Output "BAD : $_" }; $idx = Get-Content "assets/writing/units/index.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $s = $idx | Where-Object { $_.section_id -eq '2.5' }; foreach \($u in $s\) { $open = if \($u.published -and $u.asset\) {'OPEN'} else {'locked'}; Write-Output \("  2.5  {0,-44} {1}" -f $u.title, $open\) }; $l2 = $idx | Where-Object { $_.level -eq 2 }; Write-Output "L2 total=$\($l2.Count\) open=$\(@\($l2 | Where-Object {$_.published -eq $true}\).Count\) locked=$\(@\($l2 | Where-Object {-not $_.published}\).Count\)")

PowerShell($files = @\("l2_few_little","l2_too_enough","l2_connectors_because_so","l2_connectors_although_but"\); foreach \($n in $files\) { try { Get-Content "assets/writing/units/$n.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Write-Output "OK  $n" } catch { Write-Output "BAD $n : $_" } }; $idx = Get-Content "assets/writing/units/index.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "--- index OK ---"; $s = $idx | Where-Object { $_.section_id -eq '2.6' }; foreach \($u in $s\) { $open = if \($u.published -and $u.asset\) {'OPEN'} else {'locked'}; Write-Output \("  2.6  {0,-30} {1}" -f $u.title, $open\) }; $l2 = $idx | Where-Object { $_.level -eq 2 }; Write-Output "L2 total=$\($l2.Count\) open=$\(@\($l2 | Where-Object {$_.published -eq $true}\).Count\) locked=$\(@\($l2 | Where-Object {-not $_.published}\).Count\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('assets/writing/units/index.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\);import collections;c=collections.Counter\(\(e['level'],\) for e in d\);print\(sorted\({e['level'] for e in d}\)\);print\('sections:',sorted\({\(e['level'],e['section_id'],e['section']\) for e in d}\)\)")
